idea-plugin.name: CSS Glyph Preview
idea-plugin.description:
Preview icon-font glyphs (such as FontAwesome) directly in your CSS and SCSS editor.

  • Gutter preview — shows the rendered glyph next to every content: "\fXXXX" declaration. The rule's font-family (SCSS variables are resolved) and font-weight decide which font is used.
  • Icon picker — code completion inside the content value, searchable by icon name, each item showing its glyph. Selecting an icon inserts the escape and, if needed, sets the required font-weight so it also renders in the browser.

You register your own icon fonts (.ttf/.otf) and an optional name map (e.g. FontAwesome's fontawesome.min.css) under Settings > Tools > CSS Glyph Preview. The chosen files are copied into the IDE config folder, so they keep working after the originals are deleted.

Requires an IDE with bundled CSS support (IntelliJ IDEA Ultimate, WebStorm, PhpStorm, PyCharm Professional, etc.). Not affiliated with or endorsed by Fonticons, Inc. (FontAwesome).
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.0

  • Initial public release.
  • Gutter glyph preview for CSS/SCSS content declarations.
  • Searchable icon picker with automatic font-weight insertion.
  • FontAwesome 6/7 (--fa) and legacy ::before metadata parsing.
  • Project-wide SCSS variable resolution and weight-preferred font fallback.
